report.title: UKSI taxon groups for TanHub
report.description: A list of UKSI taxon groups for TanHub.
report.query: SELECT #columns# FROM taxon_groups tg -- Only groups used in the list and from our list of configured groups, -- or a parent of something in one of those groups. JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttl ON cttl.taxon_group_id=tg.id AND cttl.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# JOIN cache_taxon_paths ctp ON cttl.taxon_meaning_id = any(ctp.path) JOIN cache_taxa_taxon_lists cttlc ON cttlc.taxon_meaning_id=ctp.taxon_meaning_id AND cttlc.taxon_list_id=#taxon_list_id# AND cttlc.taxon_group IN (#taxon_groups#) AND cttlc.allow_data_entry=true #joins# WHERE tg.deleted=false

param.name: taxon_list_id
param.description: ID of the taxon list to load taxon groups for.

param.name: taxon_groups
param.description: Taxon groups of the taxa to load, quoted CSV.
